title: andropogon ramosus
intro: Andropogon ramosus, also known as the Eastern Broomsedge or Broomsedge Bluestem, is a type of grass native to North America. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Andropogon ramosus include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of digestive problems. Andropogon ramosus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and roots being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
